scripts.infra:reset-db: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.local.yml down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.local.yml up -d
scripts.dev:docker:logs: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.local.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f app
scripts.sso:logs: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.local.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.sso.yml logs -f keycloak caddy-sso
scripts.sso:seed: docker exec insights-local-postgres psql -U insights -d insights -f /dev/stdin < infra/sql/sso-test-seed.sql
